name: ULTRA Vegito
description:
I will kill all the Gods!

Decided to make a Ultra Vegito Bot since one there's not a lot of Ultra Vegito bots, two I have made two UV bots and three I was bored. There's no exactly a specific time frame but I'll put all the current forms from the wiki just in case. Some parts are made by me while others I pasted from the wiki. (Deadove sinceVegito is brutal) If you say in the reviews too much tokens I minimized tokens. This is probably if you want to battle with Ultra Vegito since most of the tok ns are for forms and attacks.
creator: Meshy Fresh
